children.heading: State proceedings
children.label: a State proceedings
children.text: The Secretary of the Treasury may discontinue forfeiture proceedings under this chapter in favor of forfeiture under State law. If a complaint for forfeiture is filed under this chapter, the Attorney General may seek dismissal of the complaint in favor of forfeiture under State law.

children.heading: Transfer of seized property; notice
children.label: b Transfer of seized property; notice

children.text: the United States may transfer the seized property to the appropriate State or local official; and
notice of the discontinuance or dismissal shall be provided to all known interested parties.

children.heading: Retention or transfer of forfeited property
children.label: c Retention or transfer of forfeited property
A
children.text: Retain any of the property for official use.

children.label: ii
children.text: any State or local law enforcement agency that participated directly or indirectly in the seizure or forfeiture of the property; or

children.label: A
children.text: has been agreed to by the Secretary of State;

children.label: B
children.text: is authorized in an international agreement between the United States and the foreign country; and

children.label: C
children.text: is made to a country which, if applicable, has been certified under .section 2291j(b) of title 22

Aircraft may be transferred to the Civil Air Patrol under paragraph (1)(B)(iii) in support of air search and rescue and other emergency services and, pursuant to a memorandum of understanding entered into with a Federal agency, illegal drug traffic surveillance. Jet-powered aircraft may not be transferred to the Civil Air Patrol under the authority of paragraph (1)(B)(iii).

children.heading: Liability of United States after transfer
children.label: d Liability of United States after transfer
children.text: The United States shall not be liable in any action relating to property transferred under this section if such action is based on an act or omission occurring after the transfer.
